notes: L26 Orientation (act 152) 'Binary search on the answer — when the answer IS the search space', 1007.9s, 8 cues. New idiom lib binsearch.py (candidate_row + monotonic ✓/✗ badges, paint_feasibility, boundary_ring, region_brace). READ start/mid/end each cue from muxed mp4. 2 -ql iterations (round-1 fixed family-chip row width overflow >safe-area, Split-Array candidate-chip overlapping Σ labels). All math verified.
